exercises.title: Constant-Time Primitives Library
exercises.description: Implement a library of constant-time primitive operations.
hints: Use bitwise operations instead of branches

exercises.title: Masked Polynomial Arithmetic
exercises.description: Implement masked polynomial operations for lattice cryptography.
exercises.expectedOutput: Masked polynomial operations with security verification
hints: Each coefficient needs its own mask
Addition of masked values is straightforward

exercises.title: Timing Attack Simulator
exercises.description: Build a timing attack simulator for educational purposes.
hints: Average over many iterations for accuracy
Show statistical confidence in timing differences

exercises.title: Side-Channel Vulnerability Audit
exercises.description: Audit a PQC implementation for side-channel vulnerabilities.
tasks: Identify conditional branches on secret data
exercises.expectedOutput: Security audit report with findings and recommendations
hints: Look for if statements involving secrets
Consider both timing and power channels
